name: Dead Code Detection
description: Workspace scanner for unused exports, unused locals, and commented-out code blocks. Analysed via dead-code-detect.mjs (TypeScript compiler API). The host runs the scan and persists results to <repo>/.code-workbench/dead-code-findings.json; the cw-dead-code MCP tool reads that file and applies acks at read time. Surfaced as the MCP tool detect_dead_code and the VS Code extension's full editor-tab Dead Code page (scanPages.ts, replacing the old sidebar DeadCodeView) rendering the shared @code-workbench/ui DeadCodePanel; opened from the Code Health action bar via codeWorkbench.deadCode.scan.
guidelines: Scan execution, ack, exclude, and findings persistence are delegated to shared-scan-service (scan-runner/scan-state/findings-store); the extension host keeps only path/binary resolution
Host scan callsites pass persistTo: repoPath so the Rescan button is the canonical entry point that produces the findings file the MCP tool reads
CLI entry-point guard must use pathToFileURL(process.argv[1]).href
The pane UI is the shared ui DeadCodePanel/ScanPanel — the extension wraps it with its own ScanPaneApi adapter; do not re-implement the tab/scan shell
The detect_dead_code MCP tool reads findings + applies acks at read time; response includes generatedAt and stale (>24h). force_scan: true is the explicit inline-scan escape hatch.
anti_patterns: Inline readJsonArray/writeJsonArray in host code — use scan-state/findings-store instead
Pass repoPath directly to fs APIs without locToFsPath — WSL repos will fail
Define groupFingerprint locally — it lives in scan-runner.cjs
Re-implement the scan panel UI — use the shared ui ScanPanel
Make detect_dead_code run a fresh inline scan on every call — it should read the persisted findings; force_scan: true is the explicit opt-in
decisions: The extension host is a thin adapter delegating scan/ack/exclude/persist to shared-scan-service
The scan panel UI moved into @code-workbench/ui; the extension's DeadCodeView is now a React webview rather than a vanilla-JS script
Host-writes / MCP-reads: detect_dead_code reads <repo>/.code-workbench/dead-code-findings.json by default. force_scan: true preserves the legacy inline-scan path for headless use.
